description: ASIA MVP - Canine lymphoma clinical decision support. RAG-powered Italian-language synthesis with sentence-level citations for veterinary oncologists.

phases.name: Walking Skeleton
phases.goal: Prove the core value proposition: a vet types a question, gets an Italian synthesis with verifiable citations.

steps.name: Project Infrastructure Setup
steps.description: Docker Compose with FastAPI skeleton (port 8000), Next.js skeleton (port 3000), PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector (port 5432). Database schema migration for papers, chunks, cases, case_queries, ingestion_runs tables. Pre-commit hooks with import-linter and eslint-plugin-boundaries. Pydantic Settings configuration.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up starts all 3 services without errors
FastAPI health endpoint returns 200 at /api/health
Next.js renders a placeholder homepage at localhost:3000
PostgreSQL has all tables created with pgvector extension enabled
import-linter contracts configured for domain/ports/services/adapters boundaries
deliverables: Running Docker Compose stack with all 3 services
PostgreSQL schema with pgvector extension and all tables
FastAPI skeleton with health endpoint and port interfaces

steps.name: Ingestion Pipeline Seed
steps.description: Populate PostgreSQL with papers and chunk embeddings for the 5 critical queries (first-line CHOP, CHOP-19 vs CHOP-25, rescue protocols, T-cell vs B-cell prognosis, doxorubicin dose adjustment). Implement EmbeddingProvider adapter (sentence-transformers MiniLM), PaperRepository adapter (pgvector), and ingestion service. Seed corpus with sufficient papers to answer all 5 pre-loaded queries.
acceptance_criteria: Corpus contains papers relevant to all 5 critical queries
Chunks table has embeddings (384 dimensions) for all ingested papers
IVFFlat index is built on chunks.embedding
Vector similarity search returns relevant chunks for each of the 5 query topics
Ingestion run is logged in ingestion_runs table
deliverables: Seeded corpus with canine lymphoma papers
Working PaperRepository adapter with pgvector search

steps.name: Core Query Flow - Cited Synthesis
steps.description: Implement the full RAG pipeline: query embedding, pgvector retrieval, LLM synthesis with citation markers, evidence level scoring, and SSE streaming response. Implement LLMProvider adapter (Groq/Llama 3.3 70B), SynthesisGenerator service, and RAG pipeline orchestration. Wire the POST /api/query endpoint to stream results via SSE. Frontend renders synthesis with citation markers and evidence level badge.
acceptance_criteria: Veterinarian submits a clinical question and receives a synthesis in Italian
Synthesis contains at least 1 inline citation marker
Evidence level indicator (ALTO/MODERATO/BASSO) is displayed
Medical disclaimer is visible
steps.scenario_name: Veterinarian asks a clinical question and receives a cited synthesis in Italian
deliverables: Frontend synthesis rendering with citations and evidence badge

steps.name: Citation Verification - Source Panel
steps.description: Implement the source panel that displays author, year, and DOI link for each citation. Ensure citation markers in synthesis map 1:1 to source panel entries. SSE sends source metadata before synthesis tokens.
acceptance_criteria: Each citation in the synthesis has a corresponding source panel entry
Source panel shows author, year, and a link to the paper for each citation
Number of source panel entries matches number of citation markers in synthesis
steps.scenario_name: Veterinarian verifies a citation from the synthesis
deliverables: Source panel component with author, year, DOI link
SSE sources event sent before synthesis tokens

steps.name: Homepage Discovery
steps.description: Implement corpus metadata endpoint (GET /api/corpus-metadata) returning corpus date and paper count. Implement pre-loaded queries endpoint (GET /api/pre-loaded-queries) returning 5 queries. Homepage displays search box, pre-loaded query placeholders, case mode CTA, explain paper CTA, disclaimer, and corpus date.
acceptance_criteria: Homepage shows a search box for clinical questions
Homepage shows a 'Crea nuovo caso' button for case management
Homepage shows an 'Explain a Paper' option
Medical disclaimer is visible
Corpus date is displayed
steps.scenario_name: Veterinarian discovers ASIA and understands its purpose
deliverables: Homepage with search, CTAs, disclaimer, and corpus date

phases.name: Demo Ready
phases.goal: Pre-loaded queries with verified accurate responses, protocol comparison table, and graceful error handling for a stakeholder demo.

steps.name: Pre-loaded Query Cards Display
steps.description: Homepage displays the 5 pre-loaded clinical queries as clickable cards. Cards sourced from config/pre_loaded_queries.py. Each card shows the query text and a brief topic label.
acceptance_criteria: Homepage displays 5 pre-loaded clinical queries as clickable cards
Queries cover first-line protocol, protocol comparison, rescue protocols, prognosis, and dose adjustment
steps.scenario_name: Homepage displays five pre-loaded clinical queries as clickable cards

steps.name: Pre-loaded Query Submission
steps.description: Clicking a pre-loaded query card submits it to the evidence pipeline. Query text is displayed at the top of the response page. Streaming begins immediately.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a query card submits it for evidence synthesis
A streaming response begins
The query text is displayed at the top of the response
steps.scenario_name: Clicking a pre-loaded query submits it to the evidence pipeline
deliverables: Query text displayed in response header

steps.name: Q1 Accuracy - First-line Protocol
steps.description: Validate and tune the RAG pipeline to produce an accurate cited response for Q1: first-line CHOP protocol for B-cell stage III lymphoma. Verify synthesis mentions CHOP, remission rates, and cites relevant studies. Calibrate retrieval thresholds and synthesis prompts.
acceptance_criteria: Synthesis mentions the CHOP protocol
Synthesis mentions remission rates
Response includes citations from relevant lymphoma studies
No citation refers to a non-existent paper
steps.scenario_name: First-line protocol query produces an accurate cited response
deliverables: Tuned RAG pipeline for Q1 accuracy

steps.name: Q2 Accuracy - Protocol Comparison
steps.description: Validate RAG pipeline produces accurate cited response for Q2: CHOP-19 vs CHOP-25 outcome differences. Verify synthesis discusses outcome equivalence and cites the Sorenmo multicenter study.
acceptance_criteria: Synthesis discusses outcome equivalence between CHOP-19 and CHOP-25
Response cites the Sorenmo multicenter study
No citation refers to a non-existent paper
steps.scenario_name: Protocol comparison query produces an accurate cited response
deliverables: Tuned RAG pipeline for Q2 accuracy

steps.name: Q3 Accuracy - Rescue Protocols
steps.description: Validate RAG pipeline produces accurate cited response for Q3: rescue protocols for early relapse after CHOP. Verify synthesis mentions at least 2 rescue protocol options with citations.
acceptance_criteria: Synthesis mentions at least 2 rescue protocol options
Each recommendation has at least 1 citation
No citation refers to a non-existent paper
steps.scenario_name: Rescue protocol query produces an accurate cited response
deliverables: Tuned RAG pipeline for Q3 accuracy

steps.name: Q4 Accuracy - Prognosis by Immunophenotype
steps.description: Validate RAG pipeline produces accurate cited response for Q4: T-cell vs B-cell prognosis. Verify synthesis discusses prognostic differences and mentions B-cell better prognosis.
acceptance_criteria: Synthesis discusses the prognostic difference between immunophenotypes
Synthesis mentions that B-cell has a better prognosis
Each claim has at least 1 citation
No citation refers to a non-existent paper
steps.scenario_name: Prognosis query produces an accurate cited response
deliverables: Tuned RAG pipeline for Q4 accuracy

steps.name: Q5 Accuracy - Dose Adjustment
steps.description: Validate RAG pipeline produces accurate cited response for Q5: doxorubicin dose adjustment for neutropenia. Verify synthesis provides grade-specific guidance with citations.
acceptance_criteria: Synthesis provides grade-specific dose adjustment guidance
Each recommendation has at least 1 citation
No citation refers to a non-existent paper
steps.scenario_name: Dose adjustment query produces an accurate cited response
deliverables: Tuned RAG pipeline for Q5 accuracy

steps.name: Comparison Table Generation
steps.description: Implement query type classification (comparison vs standard) and structured protocol comparison table generation. When a comparison query is detected, the synthesis includes a structured table with protocol name, remission rate, median survival, and citation references.
acceptance_criteria: Comparison query generates a response with a comparison table
Table has columns for protocol name, remission rate, and median survival
Each row in the table has a citation reference
steps.scenario_name: Comparison query generates a structured protocol table

steps.name: Non-comparison Query Table Absence
steps.description: Verify that non-comparison queries (e.g., prognosis) produce a synthesis without a comparison table. Query type classification correctly identifies standard queries.
acceptance_criteria: Non-comparison query response is a synthesis with citations
No comparison table is displayed for non-comparison queries
steps.scenario_name: Non-comparison query does not generate a table
deliverables: Query type classification handles non-comparison correctly

steps.name: Out-of-scope Query - No Evidence Message
steps.description: Implement confidence threshold check after retrieval. When max cosine similarity < 0.35 or average top-5 < 0.25, return an honest no-evidence message in Italian with scope explanation and suggestions (rephrase, try pre-loaded, PubMed link).
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-scope query returns a message indicating insufficient evidence
Message explains the corpus covers canine multicentric lymphoma
Suggestions are provided to rephrase or try pre-loaded queries
steps.scenario_name: Out-of-scope query returns an honest no-evidence message
deliverables: Confidence threshold check in RAG pipeline
No-evidence response with Italian message and suggestions

steps.name: No Fabrication on Missing Evidence
steps.description: Verify that when evidence is genuinely missing (e.g., feline pulmonary carcinoma), ASIA returns no clinical synthesis and no citations. The system honestly states insufficient evidence was found.
acceptance_criteria: Response contains no clinical synthesis for off-topic query
No citations are included
Response honestly states that insufficient evidence was found
steps.scenario_name: ASIA never fabricates an answer when evidence is missing
deliverables: No-fabrication behavior verified for off-topic queries

steps.name: Slow Response Progress Feedback
steps.description: Implement SSE heartbeat events during long-running queries. After 5 seconds, show progress indicator with paper count being analyzed. After 10 seconds, show estimated completion time. Heartbeats sent every 3 seconds.
acceptance_criteria: Progress indicator appears when response takes more than 10 seconds
Indicator shows number of papers being analyzed
Estimated completion time is displayed
steps.scenario_name: Slow response shows progress feedback
deliverables: SSE heartbeat events with progress data

steps.name: Self-reflective Citation Verification
steps.description: Implement the self-reflective verification pass. After initial synthesis, verify each citation-claim pair via LLM. Remove unsupported citations (NON_SUPPORTA), soften partial claims (PARZIALE). Display transparency note when citations are removed.
acceptance_criteria: When verification detects an unsupported citation, it is removed from the final response
A transparency note explains that a citation was removed for quality assurance
Final response contains only verified citations
steps.scenario_name: Self-reflective verification removes an unsupported citation
deliverables: Citation verifier service with SUPPORTA/PARZIALE/NON_SUPPORTA classification

steps.name: Italian Error Messages with Next Steps
steps.description: Implement error handler middleware that ensures all error messages are in Italian, suggest concrete next steps, and never expose technical error codes or raw system messages.
acceptance_criteria: Error messages are in Italian
Messages suggest concrete next steps
No technical error codes or raw system messages are shown
steps.scenario_name: Error messages are in Italian and suggest next steps

steps.name: Streaming Connection Loss Recovery
steps.description: Implement frontend behavior that preserves partial content when SSE connection is lost mid-stream. Display a banner explaining the interruption and offer a retry button. Partial response with citations keeps source panel entries.
acceptance_criteria: Partial response already received is preserved on screen when connection is lost
A message explains the connection was interrupted
A retry option is available
steps.scenario_name: Streaming connection lost preserves partial content
deliverables: SSE hook handles connection loss gracefully

steps.name: Property: No Fabricated Citations
steps.description: Implement property-shaped validation that every cited paper exists in the corpus or in PubMed, and every citation marker corresponds to a source panel entry. This validates the citation integrity invariant across any query.
acceptance_criteria: Every cited paper exists in the corpus or in PubMed
Every citation marker in the synthesis corresponds to a source panel entry
steps.scenario_name: No response ever contains fabricated citations
deliverables: Property test validates no fabricated citations

steps.name: Property: Medical Disclaimer on Every Page
steps.description: Implement and validate that the medical disclaimer is visible and cannot be dismissed on every page of the ASIA application. Disclaimer rendered in root layout.
acceptance_criteria: Medical disclaimer is visible on every page
Disclaimer cannot be hidden or dismissed
steps.scenario_name: Medical disclaimer is visible on every page

phases.name: Clinical Workflow
phases.goal: Persistent case management with patient context injection and paper explanation feature.

steps.name: Full Case Creation
steps.description: Implement case creation with all fields: patient name, breed, age, diagnosis, stage, immunophenotype, and clinical notes. POST /api/cases endpoint with validation. Case form frontend with all fields. Case page displays entered details.
acceptance_criteria: Case is created successfully with all patient information fields
Case page displays all the entered patient details
steps.scenario_name: Veterinarian creates a new case with full patient information

steps.name: Minimal Case Creation - Required Fields Only
steps.description: Verify that a case can be created with only required fields (name and diagnosis). Optional fields are stored as empty/null without error.
acceptance_criteria: Case is created successfully with only name and diagnosis
Optional fields are stored as empty
steps.scenario_name: Veterinarian creates a case with only required fields
deliverables: Optional field handling in form and API

steps.name: Case Context Injection in Queries
steps.description: Implement context injection when a query is submitted within a case. Patient context (breed, age, diagnosis, stage, immunophenotype) is prepended to the LLM synthesis prompt. Query and response are saved to case history. POST /api/cases/{id}/query endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Response considers the patient context when querying within a case
Query and response are saved in the case's history
steps.scenario_name: Query within a case automatically includes patient context
deliverables: Query log saved to case history

steps.name: Case History - Chronological Query List
steps.description: Implement case history view showing all queries in chronological order with most recent at top. Each entry shows query text, timestamp, and expandable full response.
acceptance_criteria: All queries within a case are listed with timestamps
Most recent query appears at the top
Full response for any past query is viewable
steps.scenario_name: Case history shows all queries in chronological order
deliverables: Chronological query list with expandable responses

steps.name: Case Data Persistence Across Sessions
steps.description: Verify that case data (patient details and query history) persists across browser sessions. Data is stored in PostgreSQL and survives application restarts.
acceptance_criteria: All patient details are intact after reopening ASIA
All previous queries and responses are available
steps.scenario_name: Case data persists across sessions

steps.name: Case Creation Validation - Required Fields Missing
steps.description: Implement validation that prevents case creation when required fields (name, diagnosis) are missing. Show clear Italian error message. No incomplete case is stored.
acceptance_criteria: Case creation fails with a clear message about the missing required field
No incomplete case is stored
steps.scenario_name: Case creation fails when required fields are missing
deliverables: Server-side validation for required case fields

steps.name: Explain Paper - In Corpus
steps.description: Implement Explain This Paper feature for papers in the ASIA corpus. POST /api/explain-paper endpoint accepts a DOI, retrieves the paper from the corpus, and generates a structured clinical summary in Italian via SSE. Summary includes study objective, methodology, key results, practical implications, and corpus context sections.
acceptance_criteria: Veterinarian receives a structured clinical summary in Italian
Summary includes sections for study objective, methodology, key results, practical implications, and corpus context
steps.scenario_name: Veterinarian gets a structured summary of a paper in the corpus
deliverables: Explain paper API endpoint with SSE

steps.name: Explain Paper - Abstract Only (Not in Corpus)
steps.description: When a DOI is submitted for a paper not in the corpus, fetch the abstract from PubMed or Semantic Scholar and generate an abstract-based summary. Display a warning note that the summary is based on the abstract only.
acceptance_criteria: Veterinarian receives a summary based on the paper abstract
A note warns that the summary is based on the abstract only
steps.scenario_name: Paper not in the corpus produces an abstract-based summary
deliverables: External paper fetch via PubMed/Semantic Scholar

steps.name: Explain Paper - Invalid DOI Error
steps.description: When an invalid or non-existent DOI is submitted, display a helpful Italian error message suggesting to verify the DOI or try the paper title instead.
acceptance_criteria: Error message indicates the paper could not be found
Suggestion to verify the DOI or try the paper title instead
steps.scenario_name: Invalid DOI returns a helpful error message
deliverables: DOI validation with Italian error messages

steps.name: Minimal Case Context Query
steps.description: Verify that querying within a case that has only required fields (name and diagnosis, no breed/age/stage) still produces a valid synthesis. Context injection omits empty optional fields gracefully.
acceptance_criteria: Veterinarian receives a synthesis in Italian for a minimal-context case
Response is not negatively affected by the missing optional fields
steps.scenario_name: Query within a case with minimal context still produces a response
deliverables: Context injection handles missing optional fields
Minimal case query produces valid response

steps.name: Empty DOI Validation
steps.description: Frontend validation prevents submitting an empty DOI field. Display an Italian message asking the user to enter a DOI or paper title. No request is sent to the backend.
acceptance_criteria: Empty DOI submission shows a message asking to enter a DOI or paper title
No request is sent to the backend
steps.scenario_name: Empty DOI input shows a validation message

validation.coverage_notes: Steps 01-01 and 01-02 are infrastructure setup without acceptance scenarios. All 30 acceptance scenarios (3 WS + 17 M1 + 11 M2, including 2 property scenarios) are mapped to steps. Property scenarios M1-P1 and M1-P2 are mapped to steps 02-16 and 02-17 respectively.
